---
title: "Demo Quarto Document"
format: html
---

## Introduction

This document demonstrates Raven's Quarto chunk detection.

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
library(dplyr)
```

## Data Processing

```{r}
#| label: transform
result <- mtcars |>
  filter(cyl == 6) |>
  summarise(mean_mpg = mean(mpg))
result
```

Some prose between chunks.

```{r}
#| label: output
#| echo: true
print(result)
```
